name: Baby Raccoon Ponpoko
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>子</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>狸</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>だぬき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ぽんぽこ
desc: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 Level 2 Beast monster from your Deck in face-down Defense Position, except "Baby Raccoon Ponpoko". You cannot Special Summon monsters the turn you activate this effect, except Beast monsters.
mnst_eff: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 Level 2 Beast monster from your Deck in face-down Defense Position, except "Baby Raccoon Ponpoko". You cannot Special Summon monsters the turn you activate this effect, except Beast monsters.
eff: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 Level 2 Beast monster from your Deck in face-down Defense Position, except "Baby Raccoon Ponpoko". You cannot Special Summon monsters the turn you activate this effect, except Beast monsters.

summoning: Restricts the player's Special Summons to Type specific monsters
